description: Market intelligence agent for NorthStar Health. Discovers growth opportunities and analyses market dynamics across products, market performance and customer personas, and produces grounded category/market/pricing recommendations.

skills.name: Opportunity Analysis
skills.description: Identify the highest-growth category and market by combining market performance, competitor positioning and persona demand, and recommend a price point.

skills.name: Persona Targeting
skills.description: Find the customer personas most likely to respond to a category or product and explain why.
